summary: The implementation covers most requirements well, including the backend actor with 5 predefined products, add stock, record sale, today's sales, and reset functions. The frontend has all 6 screens with password gates, dark theme, amber accents, and mobile-first layout. However, there are notable gaps: the backend does not expose a getProducts query (explicitly acknowledged in ViewInventory.tsx as a backend gap), so the View Inventory screen cannot show actual stock quantities. The backend also uses non-stable heap collections which may not survive canister restarts. Additionally, the requested shop-logo image asset is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes query to list all products with their current stock and last purchase price
missing_requirements.reason: The backend (main.mo) does not implement a getProducts or getAllProducts query function. The ViewInventory.tsx frontend explicitly notes this gap and falls back to showing product names only with dashes for stock quantities.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product stock quantity and purchase price are persisted across restarts via stable storage
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses let products = Map.fromIter and let sales = List.empty which are heap-allocated mutable collections, not declared as stable var. These will not survive canister upgrades or restarts.

missing_requirements.requirement: Sale records are persisted across restarts
missing_requirements.reason: The sales list is let sales = List.empty() which is heap-allocated and not stable storage. It will be lost on canister upgrade or restart.

missing_requirements.requirement: Inventory shows all 5 products with their current stock quantities
missing_requirements.reason: The ViewInventory page cannot show actual stock quantities because the backend does not expose a getProducts query. It shows a dash for all stock values and displays a warning banner about this limitation.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity and AuthClient integration with login/logout flow and identity-based actor creation
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists Internet Identity or any authentication system beyond the hardcoded password as a non-goal, yet the codebase includes a full InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient setup, useInternetIdentity hook, and identity-aware actor creation.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution footer displayed on every screen
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any footer or attribution link. A persistent footer with a caffeine.ai link was added to every page via the Layout component.
